zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Darcy於1427年4月出生在英國艾可馬爾頓時，她的父親Robert Darcy36歲，母親Lady Alice Fitzlangley33歲。她於1449年與John Clopton在英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1454年在英國素福爾可享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Darcy于1427年4月出生在英国艾可馬爾頓时，她的父亲Robert Darcy36岁，母亲Lady Alice Fitzlangley33岁。她于1449年与John Clopton在英国英格兰艾可馬爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1454年在英国素福爾可享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Darcy was born in April 1427, in Maldon, Essex, England, her father, Robert Darcy, was 36 and her mother, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, was 33. She married John Clopton in 1449, in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1454, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Darcy est née en avril 1427, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Darcy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Clopton en 1449, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1454, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Darcy im April 1427 in Maldon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Darcy 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Fitzlangley 33. Sie hat 1449 in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom John Clopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1454 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Darcy è nata il nel aprile 1427 nel Maldon, Essex, England, sua padre, Robert Darcy, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato John Clopton nel 1449, nel Maldon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1454, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Darcyが1427年4月にイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Robert Darcyは36歳，母Lady Alice Fitzlangleyは33歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマルドンでJohn Cloptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1454年にイギリススフォルクで27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Darcy(이)가 1427년 4월 영국 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Darcy(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Fitzlangley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던에서 John Clopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1454년 영국 수폴크에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Darcy nasceu em abril de 1427, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Darcy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com John Clopton em 1449, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1454, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Darcy родилась апрель 1427 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Darcy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Fitzlangley, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Clopton в 1449 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1454 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Darcy nació en abril de 1427, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Darcy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, tenía 33 años. Se casó con John Clopton en 1449, en Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1454, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
